name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: PLS Check Cashers cashes payroll, government & personal checks with no bank account needed, plus money orders, bill pay, money transfers & prepaid cards.
description_long:
PLS Check Cashers is operated under PLS Financial Services, Inc., a for-profit alternative financial services company founded in 1997 by brothers Bob and Dan Wolfberg in Aurora, Illinois. Headquartered at One South Wacker Drive in Chicago, PLS — which stands for "People, Location and Service" — has grown to 200+ retail locations across 12 states, with a concentration in urban and suburban communities that are underserved by traditional banking. The company is not a nonprofit, CDFI, or HUD-approved counseling agency; it is a state-licensed check cashing and alternative lending operator, regulated under NMLS and individual state financial services regulators. It celebrated 25 years in business in 2022.

PLS Check Cashers offers a wide range of walk-in financial services requiring no traditional bank account. Core services include cashing of payroll, government, personal, and tax refund checks (fees reported by third parties at approximately 1% of the check amount plus $1, though exact current rates should be confirmed at the counter). The company also provides money orders (free at select locations), bill payment, and international money transfers through a partnership with Ria Money Transfer. Prepaid debit card services are available via the Xpectations!® Plus Debit Card, issued in partnership with Green Dot. Select locations offer payday and installment loans through affiliated PLS Financial Services entities — availability and rates vary by state law and are not universally listed online. Some stores also provide tax preparation, auto insurance, vehicle license and registration services, and notary services.

What distinguishes PLS is its "247" brand positioning — many locations operate extended or round-the-clock hours, addressing a gap for customers who need financial services outside standard banking hours. Its mobile app (PLS Mobile, available on iOS and Android) allows Xpectations cardholders to manage their prepaid account, freeze/unfreeze the card, view transaction history, deposit checks remotely, and locate nearby stores. The company's footprint in underserved urban neighborhoods and its no-bank-account-required model have made it a practical option for the unbanked and underbanked population, which the FDIC estimates at tens of millions of U.S. households.

The honest assessment: PLS is a convenient, accessible option for people who need to cash a check or send money quickly without a bank account, and its extended hours are a genuine differentiator. However, transaction fees on check cashing — even at roughly 1% plus $1 — add up over time compared to free bank or credit union alternatives. Payday loan rates, where offered, are governed by state law and can carry high APRs. BBB ratings vary widely across individual store locations rather than reflecting a unified corporate rating, so consumers should verify their specific location's standing. PLS is not appropriate for consumers seeking credit repair, debt relief, or long-term financial planning — it is a transactional, walk-in cash services business.
address: 6225 S Figueroa St, Los Angeles, CA 90003

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee applicable — PLS is a transaction-fee-based walk-in services business, not a subscription or product company.

certifications: State-licensed check casher (NMLS, varies by state)

pros: Founded in 1997 — 25+ years operating in alternative financial services
200+ locations across 12 states with neighborhood-level access in underserved communities
Many locations operate extended or 24-hour hours under the PLS 247 brand
No bank account required for any service
International money transfers available via Ria Money Transfer partnership
Prepaid Xpectations!® Plus Debit Card with Green Dot partnership enables direct deposit and card management
PLS Mobile app supports remote check deposit, card freeze/unfreeze, and balance tracking on iOS and Android
cons: Check cashing fees (reported ~1% + $1) are a recurring cost that adds up versus free bank or credit union alternatives
Payday and installment loan rates vary by state and can carry high APRs — not disclosed transparently online
BBB rating varies by individual store location rather than a single corporate rating — quality may differ by branch
Only available in 12 states — not a national option
No credit-building, savings, or financial planning products — purely transactional
best_for: Unbanked individuals who need to cash payroll or government checks immediately
Underbanked consumers who need bill pay, money orders, or international transfers without a bank account
Customers who need financial services during evenings, weekends, or overnight when banks are closed
Prepaid card users seeking a network with in-person cash loading and account management support
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best suited for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need reliable, immediate access to cash from checks or who require walk-in financial services — especially outside standard banking hours. The main caveat is cost: transaction fees and potential payday loan APRs make PLS a convenience product, not a cost-saving one, and consumers with bank accounts will almost always find cheaper alternatives for the same services.
services: Check cashing (payroll, government, personal, tax refund checks)
International money transfers via Ria Money Transfer
Prepaid debit cards — Xpectations!® Plus Debit Card (Green Dot)
Payday and installment loans (select states via PLS Financial Services)
Vehicle license and registration services (select locations)
